TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Lukut, title = Lukut, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lukut} }

S.FORM: lukut ira ku lukut atu cupel
S.PHON: ɾo~u~uko~u~ut ira ko~u~u ɾo~u~uko~u~ut ato~u~u ʦo~u~upəɾ

S.PHON: ɾo~u~uko~u~ut ira ko~u~u ɾo~u~uko~u~ut ato~u~u ʦo~u~upəɾ
